programme.desc: While Greg tries to support an increasingly emotional Katie, Dylan attempts to steer a promising student towards poetry; Sunny is delighted when Archie starts to engage more with her pregnancy.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of childhood friends wrestle with the virtue of faith, the possibility of redemption and the problem of evil.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000-foot El Capitan; as Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of childhood friends wrestle with the virtue of faith, the possibility of redemption and the problem of evil.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: While Greg tries to support an increasingly emotional Katie, Dylan attempts to steer a promising student towards poetry; Sunny is delighted when Archie starts to engage more with her pregnancy.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000-foot El Capitan; as Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Set on a college campus centering on an author's complicated relationship with his daughter.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: A television actress tries desperately to revive her career.

programme.title: Alien
programme.desc: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
programme.desc: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Generation Por qué?
programme.desc: A woman pursues her acting dreams in New York City while enduring her very conservative parents.

programme.title: The Florida Project
programme.desc: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

programme.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Victor Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe (Robert Urquhart), with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature (Christopher Lee) out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: Vying for a spot in the U.S. Open finals, Anthony "Simo" Simonsen and Australia's Jason "Belmo" Belmonte face off as tempers escalate and injuries flare.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the Pete Weber Classic in Springfield, Missouri, named after one of the sports greats, bowler extraordinaire EJ Tackett must fend off Belmo and Simo to reclaim the top prize.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: 200 bowlers from 18 different countries descend upon Reno, Nevada to compete in the month-long World Series of Bowling.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Stopping The Steal
programme.desc: An inside account of President Trump's challenge to the results of the 2020 presidential election as told by former White House staff and appointees.

programme.title: How We Get Free
programme.desc: Over the course of two years, Elisabeth Epps works to end cash bail on all fronts, from bailing people out of jail to running for office as one of the first abolitionist candidates in Colorado.

programme.title: Finding the Way Home
programme.desc: The stories of eight children who have been reunited with family members or placed in loving foster homes after being exposed to the distressing conditions prevalent in orphanages and institutions around the world.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: The Switch
programme.desc: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
programme.desc: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
programme.desc: Porky Pig and Daffy Duck become Earth's only hope when their antics at the local bubble-gum factory uncover a secret alien mind-control plot. Faced with cosmic odds, they must save their town and the world while not driving each other totally loony.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Mondays at Racine
programme.desc: On the third Monday of every month, two sisters open their Long Island hair salon to women diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: Surviving Ohio State
programme.desc: Based on the Jon Wertheim's 2020 Sports Illustrated article, Why Aren't More People Talking About the Ohio State Sex Abuse Scandal?, chronicling Dr. Richard Strauss' years-long abuse told in part by his victims - male wrestlers and football players - most of whom have never spoken about their trauma. The documentary will also examine the allegations that Congressman Jim Jordan, an OSU assistant coach from 1986-1994, knew about and ignored Dr. Strauss' crimes.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

When the boys' bar receives a devastating 'one-fork' review from Athena - the leading food critic in Rome - despite only being open for a few days, Grumio invites her back for a rematch with an experimental new menu. Meanwhile, Jason can't seem to stop hiring waitresses...

programme.title: Count Abdulla
programme.desc: Comedy series about twenty-something British-Pakistani Muslim doctor Abdulla Khan. Something's not right as Abdulla feels out of it and has developed inexplicable allergies and insatiable cravings at work - meanwhile, his mysterious bus stop assailant Kathy is looking for him as she's worried that she may have passed something on that could spread around the community. After coming face-to-face with a stray piece of garlic naan, it's starting to become clearer what ails the junior doctor - Abdulla is left with little time before Kathy catches up with him when a quasi-religious ceremony goes wrong, so it might be up to rude-boy cousin and wannabe Shafi to save the day.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. programme.title: Family Guy

programme.title: Georgia & Tommy: Happy Essex After
programme.desc: Reality series. Georgia has a last day in Ibiza on her hen party, but she is exhausted and really starts to feel the stress when her nan announces that she might not make it to the wedding - meanwhile, Tommy finally gets round to sorting his suit, but his eye for detail may mean that he has left it too late to have the perfect outfit. With the big day looming, Tommy sets off for Mallorca by car with Monkey, the bridesmaids' dresses and both of Georgia's wedding dresses -as Georgia opts for what she thinks is the easiest route by plane, she realises that it isn't as stress-free as she hoped. With the wedding party all in Mallorca, the final countdown is on as Ben and Mark try to convince Tommy to have a stag party before Georgia and her wedding dresses reach the wedding day.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Yaz returns after her time away, and both she and Lockie are on journeys of self-discovery in a bid to help their relationship. Meanwhile, Chloe is riddled with insecurities and tries to channel her inner diva to tackle her confidence problems.

programme.title: Rio
programme.desc: Colourful animated adventure comedy. In Rio de Janeiro, baby macaw Blu is snatched from his family and smuggled into the United States - while driving through Moose Lake, Minnesota, the truck transporting Blu accidentally drops Blu's box on the road. 15 years later, Blu is a domesticated and intelligent bird that does not fly, but when an ornithologist turns up in his life and reveals that Blu is the last of his species, the macaw is invited to return to Rio to save his own kind from extinction.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: In Vietnam, things take a turn as Freddie reaches his breaking point and makes the drastic decision to leave early. Will Saff believe his side of the story, and can their friendship survive? The trip fallout deepens as Joe and Junaid grow increasingly convinced that Elma and Courtney are behind the drama, both in Vietnam and back home in Essex. When a chance encounter at lunch brings all four of them together, the gloves come off. Meanwhile, Harry is pleased with himself for becoming civil with Joe and Junaid, but Amy has other ideas. Fresh from the call, Liv joins Harry and the two find themselves asking the same question... what is going on with Courtney and Elma? Later, the trip gets a much-needed boost as twins Joe and Jonnie arrive in Vietnam with their friend Josh in tow. With the group in desperate need of a distraction, their timing couldn't be more perfect. Meanwhile, back in Essex, Saff opens up to Lauren about Ella accusing Freddie of saying something derogatory about her.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Lois notes how Chris has been crowned Homecoming Dunce at the Homecoming football game four times in a row and uses her credentials to snag a position as a substitute teacher at Adam West High, Chris fools his way into cool kid popularity in a way that disgusts Meg and his method backfires when a demand for more proof of his relationship with 'Miss Pewterschmidt' spreads throughout the school.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Peter forgets his and Lois' anniversary, Seamus lends them a boat for a dinner on the ocean that ends in a skinny dip where Peter ditches Lois in the water after mistaking a dolphin for a shark - although she is unharmed, Lois is disappointed in Peter for not being the alpha she needs in her life despite forgiving him. Meanwhile, Stewie finds a mini-fridge and decides to live a college dormitory lifestyle.

programme.title: Family Guy

Meanwhile, a viral video convinces Meg and Chris to start an online venture where Chris gets paid to sit on and smash cupcakes.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the young Detective Constable Endeavour Morse. May 1966 - Endeavour returns to Oxford City Police after a four-month absence from duty and is reunited with Thursday. Meanwhile, a Broad Street parade celebrating the might of Britain's military accomplishments is soured by a rash student stunt and thrown into sharp relief when an anonymous man plummets to his death from a nearby council building - a clutch of business cards bearing multiple identities suggest the death was more than just a routine suicide, and Endeavour flexes his gumshoe muscles to uncover the corpse's identity in a solitary pursuit that builds to a trip to London with troubling consequences. As a concerned Thursday looks on, the young Morse pulls two seemingly unrelated cases into the fray - an anguished father who is searching for a missing daughter and a smash-and-grab robbery of medieval artefacts at Oxford's Beaufort College - as he risks all to bring those responsible to justice.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Lymstock is a town with more than its share of shameful secrets, a town where even a sudden outbreak of anonymous hate mail causes only a minor stir - however, Miss Marple believes that there is more to the case than meets the eye when Mona Symmington takes her own life as a result of one of the letters. The town is thrown into turmoil as the letters become ever more deadly - someone local must be responsible, so can anyone be trusted?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby and DS Ben Jones investigate a land feud involving two farming dynasties which explodes into violence - trouble seems to be brewing in the pretty village of Ford Florey when a tract of waste ground dubbed the Swamp becomes the focus of a land dispute between two old agricultural families. Tensions are increased further after a band of travellers also lay claim to the site with a view to developing it into a place where they can settle - matters come to a head at the town's annual Fayre. While some villagers are taking part in a shootout reconstruction at a Wild West show, a woman is shot for real - she turns out to be the farm manager for one of the feuding families and the timing of her death raises questions. Barnaby and Jones launch a murder investigation and uncover a series of seething grudges within the village before another person is killed - does the Swamp hold the key to identifying the murderer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: On a dark night in the village of March Magna, Barnaby's wife Joyce swerves her car to narrowly miss a shadowy figure in the road... or so she thinks. Later that night a body is discovered in the old cemetery - did Joyce hit someone after all, or was the victim - who seems to have plenty of enemies - killed by one of the villagers? Barnaby and Jones have their work cut out as all the villagers seem to be hiding something, but is it murder?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Piano student Zoe Stock has won a place at the Devington Manor Winter School led by internationally renowned musician Sir Michael Fielding when, from the riverbank in the grounds of the manor, she sees a woman jump from the bridge and disappear underwater - when Barnaby and Jones start investigating the possible drowning, they discover unsavoury connections to the past that could prove lethal 20 years later. Can they intervene before the body count escalates, and will the talented Zoe survive her master class?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Betrayal, infidelity and blackmail fester as plans to re-enact a Victorian prizefight turn nasty - and even DCI Barnaby finds his judgement clouded by an old friend. Midsomer Morchard prepares to welcome back local boxer John Kinsella from his world title fight victory in New York - Kinsella is returning with his ruthless and controlling promoter Frank Bishop to take part in a re-enactment of a match from 1860. When Bishop arrives, he goes to see solicitor Giles Braithwaite but instead finds the lawyer dead - meanwhile, trainer Teddy Molloy is working with another fighter called Ken Tuohy, who suspects Kinsella of a dalliance with his fiancee. There are plenty of other grudges and secrets simmering in the village, with revelations of discord, adultery, gambling and Giles's assistant Iris being accused of blackmail. When it comes time for the re-enactment, Tuohy takes the place of Kinsella's opponent and attacks Kinsella - Bishop is then found dead. Can Barnaby find the killer?

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. The murder of a woman discovered in her flat initially presents as a break-in gone wrong but soon appears to be something more and leads Grace to question whether this attack was targeted - the victim Hannah Belling, a psychiatrist and founder of a popular mental health app, was well liked, but it becomes clear that she had enemies as Grace delves deeper. A number of compelling suspects present themselves - an ex-husband causing an acrimonious divorce, an obsessive stalker fired from Hannah's company, a missing brother with a criminal past, and a mysterious lover as the team also discover that Hannah's office was broken into a few days before her death - did she have something that her attacker would kill for? When blood found in Hannah's flat then reveals a chilling discovery, Roy realises that Hannah's killer is just within reach and that her death isn't the only secret they are keeping as the painful truth at the heart of the murder turns Grace's world upside down.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: DI Frost investigates if three male bodies found buried naked in the shape of a triangle are part of a satanic ritual, but will closer analysis lead him in a different direction? Meanwhile, ruthless millionaire press baron James Callum is determined to make his mark on Denton and will stop at nothing to get what he wants - will Frost be able to stop Callum in his tracks before his actions lead to fatal consequences?

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Temperatures rise when the station surgery gets a new recruit.

programme.title: Inspector Morse

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part case of the light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Lyvedon Manor is both a source of pride and a drain on the finances for Martin Frazer and his wife Suzanne - Martin is a barrister who hires Rosemary and Thyme to restore his walled garden as it has fallen into disrepair. It's a big job, but Martin has a ready source of cheap labour - the inmates of the local prison. Rosemary is nervous about working with ex-cons, and her suspicions are confirmed when Martin's cousin Jim is found drowned in the local fast-flowing river - as Laura and Rosemary struggle to bring the garden back to life, events take a mysterious turn when cousin Jim is seen alive again just before the coroner's inquest into his death.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part case of the light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Lyvedon Manor is both a source of pride and a drain on the finances for Martin Frazer and his wife Suzanne - Martin is a barrister who hires Rosemary and Thyme to restore his walled garden as it has fallen into disrepair. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When Tommy and Tuppence visit an elderly aunt in her nursing home, Tuppence is concerned by some odd behaviour of the staff and residents - when Tuppence later hears about Aunt Ada's sudden death and the disappearance of her aunt's friend Mrs Lancaster, she realises that her concerns were right. Tuppence then meets Miss Marple to follow a path of clues that leads them to the village of Farrell St Edmund - and find a community that is guarding an array of secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute turns to murder after a leading light in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe, but why is someone driven to start killing? As Maureen is attacked with a broken bottle in the grounds and bleeds to death, planning officer Liz Gerrard beds Rogers and police discover that the victims of a spate of burglaries and vandalism all support a controversial development at Pelfe Chase. Barnaby then finds a catapult at Maureen's house - was she the vandal? As Election Day approaches, Jones suspects that Fiona has given Norman Swascombe free land as a bung, but the truth surprises him - meanwhile, a night of passion for Liz and Otley turns deadly... As Dr Bullard discovers that Rogers was killed using Otley's veterinary drugs, Barnaby realises that the murderer will not stop until everyone who knows the truth is silenced.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: John Nettles makes his final appearance as DCI Tom Barnaby - with his birthday approaching, Tom reluctantly accompanies his wife Joyce on a spa weekend to Swavely Manor. The atmosphere at the spa is far from tranquil as owner Phoebe Archbold has fallen out with her old friend and wannabe novelist Miranda Bedford - when a woman is found dead in the flotation chamber, Barnaby calls in DS Jones to lead the investigation. Seeking refuge at the village pub, Barnaby learns that Phoebe married Luke after the sudden death of her first husband and Miranda's friend Carter Smith reveals he is helping her with her novel although many in the village doubt that the book really exists - back at the spa, Luke is crushed to death by a training machine soon after being threatened by Carter. After another gruesome discovery, the truth gradually emerges - as the net closes in on the killer, all Barnaby has to worry about is his birthday party, retirement, and welcoming cousin DCI John Barnaby to Causton.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Neil Dudgeon's first appearance as the head of Causton CID. John Barnaby initially rebuffs a request from Harriet Wingate, headmistress at the upmarket Darnley Park Girls School, to patrol their forthcoming classic car show, but Barnaby is intrigued when he learns that the remains of famous racing driver Duncan Palmer have been discovered at Darnley Park 40 years after he was thought to have drowned in the Lake District. Harriet is opposed to the plans of school governor Jamie Cameron and so invites his ex-wife Kate together with her father, racing legend Peter Fossett, to the show - Fossett is annoyed that his fellow judge is club DJ Dave 'Doggy' Day, who knows nothing about cars. Soon afterwards, Doggy is crushed to death under Kate's car and Barnaby thinks the video diaries of two pupils could hold clues to the killing, but a new lead takes him to meet someone at the barn where Duncan Palmer met his death. When the killer turns on him, could Barnaby's first case also be his last?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI John Barnaby takes on another case as the head of Causton CID. A social services investigator calls on elderly eccentrics William Bingham and his wife Mary but is sent away rudely by their daughter Selina and her husband Eddie Stanton - the Binghams live as recluses in upper-class squalor while the nearby Stantons run a stud farm with Ben Viviani, who is in love with Eddie's daughter Verity. Ben's mother Maggie had also humiliated the investigator - when his body is found in a river, they therefore all come under suspicion. Barnaby meets the Binghams and learns that they never recovered from losing their elder daughter and son in a drowning accident - passions are then aroused as Selina forces Ben to take her to bed before slashing Maggie's paintings with a knife. Mary later invites Barnaby to tea, but he discovers before he arrives that her daughter's body was never found - and then Mary is found dead. Could a mysterious reference to a moon crater called Bingham hold a clue?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A reclusive couple are found dead after being victims of a supposedly botched burglary which shocks the occupants of the village of Dunstan - when a guest is murdered at the wedding at one of Jones' oldest friends, could this spate of killings be connected to a mystery of a fatal road accident and the disappearance of a teenager 20 years ago?

programme.title: Playing Nice
programme.desc: Psychological thriller series, adapted from the best-selling novel by JP Delaney, that is set against a sweeping Cornish landscape. Pete is questioned by the police as Miles leaks the story to the press and costs Pete his job - with his life unravelling, Pete realises that he must dig into Miles' murky past to save his family.

programme.title: Playing Nice
programme.desc: The conclusion of the psychological thriller series, adapted from the best-selling novel by JP Delaney, that is set against a sweeping Cornish landscape. The final court hearing looms and the boys' fate will be decided - will Miles' twisted lies be exposed for what they are, or will Pete and Maddie lose everything?

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Stan and Jack find themselves involved in a fishy tale about a lost diamond.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Jack gets promoted to the position of inspector as Stan gets more than he bargained for when he invites a new conductor home for tea.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Arthur is attracted to Beryl, a clippie on his regular bus - however, Beryl has only two interests in life, men with a fondness for athletics and those with a good head of hair.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: After a night on guard outside Freddie's house, Donna is torn when she realises her mum's court case will be starting shortly. Pearl is shocked to be caught red handed by a half-naked Alan.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ted and Tina bop to some early disco whilst they get No.8 ready for the party. Lloyd warns Becky that Michelle’s worked out that Steve had a one night stand with another bird. Ken tells Ashley how Irma Ogden was an amateur artist and enjoyed copying Lowry’s paintings. Ashey’s disappointed to discover his ‘Lowry’ is a fake. Mel and Darryl arrive at No.8 for the party. Tina tells David she’s invited quite a few friends. Teresa’s annoyed by the music coming from No.8.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tina and David both hungover survey the post party damage at No.8. Sally takes photos of Rosie’s scratches intent on going to the police and reporting Teresa for assault. Kevin tries to talk her out of it. It’s Jason’s birthday. He’s pleased to receive a card from Becky but embarrassed to see posters all over the place announcing it’s his birthday. Michelle overhears Leanne on the phone to Steve and her suspicions grow. Sally goes round to No.6 and confronts Teresa.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The sudden death of a convict leads Inspector Morse and Sergeant Lewis to investigate the complex affairs of three businessmen jailed for fraud - the interests of the fraudsters' families are at stake, but so is the reputation of the governor of the progressive open prison that the fraudsters were jailed in.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Blaketon has his hands full when an elderly archaeologist dies suspiciously and important documents appear to have been stolen from the victim. He also has to deal with trout being poached from Lord Ashfordly's lake and Greengrass deciding to do a spot of treasure hunting! Aunt Eileen plays detective when she visits an old, ruined abbey, causing concern for Greengrass as he searches for buried booty. With Blaketon in hot pursuit, the pair find themselves trapped together underground inside a tunnel that collapses. Their joint worst nightmare becomes reality when they end up side by side in hospital! Gina celebrates her birthday and Nurse Maggie Bolton invites Nick to dinner.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Blaketon has been receiving complaints about rock music being broadcast from a pirate radio station. Nick and Phil who have been enjoying the music, reluctantly seek out the station which is broadcasting from a ship at sea. They are forced to take action however, when they discover that some of the people involved with the station have been distributing LSD. Nick goes undercover and makes an arresting debut as a DJ! Tragedy strikes when a recently returned young local has a fatal accident after taking the drug. Meanwhile, Greengrass and his friend Joseph decide to brew their own whisky - with explosive results!

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in woodland near Midsomer Sonning, country magazine Midsomer Life and its outspoken owner Guy Sandys come under scrutiny from Barnaby and Jones - while former city fund manager Guy is disliked in the neighbourhood for his negative reviews of local businesses, the body proves to be that of a man that Guy's wife was having an affair with. Guy himself is then found stabbed through the heart...

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Bob begs Viv to keep fighting her case when she tells him she is going to change her plea in court. Paul and Nicola accidentally use Diane's clothes to make their quilt.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nicola and Paul replace the clothes they used in the quilt and luckily Diane sees the funny side - but a text from Jonny halts the merriment.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Michelle gets a dressing-down from Dan in front of a packed pub. Vernon broaches the subject of a business venture with Liz, and Ted tries to clean up the Platts' house.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz fails to muster up the same enthusiasm as Vernon when they view the new bar. Michelle asks Becky to take over from Leanne in the Rovers.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. The village is put in jeopardy when a kidnapping case takes an unexpected turn. Blaketon enjoys his status as president of the local rugby club, until Greengrass takes an interest in the game.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Nick's pursuit of an escaped prisoner leads him into a more complex case, and Greengrass becomes a school lollipop man but his new job is soon put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: 23-year-old Dianne Price is found drowned in her bath, wrapped in net curtains, and made to look like a bride with a ring on her finger, a bouquet of cheap flowers on a toilet seat, and a chilling message written in lipstick on the bathroom mirror - Barnaby and Jones begin their investigation and find no shortage of possible culprits. While Barnaby ponders the similarity of the case to a string of murders from 1912, Jones struggles with his new boss's love of psychology - the case then leads the detectives to a donkey sanctuary and a pub run by an ex-copper and former madam. When local vet Fran Carter is murdered at a heritage steam railway site - and her body decorated with confetti - Barnaby finds parallels with another decades-old case... could history be repeating itself? It is not long before there are more shocking deaths, and Barnaby and Jones must work fast if they are to catch the killer before it is too late.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on novels by Peter Robinson. When an old neighbour tells Banks that she has discovered a gun in her teenage daughter's bedroom, his first instinct is to retrieve it without fuss - Helen persuades him that she should go by the book and enter with a firearms squad, but neither of them can foresee that this will lead to an innocent man being critically injured. An internal investigation threatens to break up the team as Annie is ordered to scrutinise Helen's role in the operation - as a consequence, professional divisions are made worse by the fledgling romantic relationship between Annie and Banks. Meanwhile, news that the gun has recently been fired leaves the DCI searching for the owner and its potential victim - on the trail of a notorious villain, Banks discovers a connection which brings the case worryingly close to home.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty crime drama series. Banks begins a desperate search for his daughter Tracy and her abductor Jaff Kitson - convinced that Al Jenkins is Jaff's accomplice in the murder of Richard Martin, Banks puts pressure on Al to lead him to Jaff but without success. Meanwhile, DS Annie Cabbot completes her investigation into DI Helen Morton's role in a botched operation, resulting in Helen's immediate suspension and driving the rift between Annie and Banks deeper - Al then makes an offer to help Banks to get his daughter back and the detective finds himself contemplating breaking every rule in the book to meet Al's demands. With Helen's career seemingly in the balance, his daughter threatened, and his relationship with Annie close to breaking point, how far will DCI Alan Banks go to keep his family together?

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oxford's last surviving all-female college is bidding farewell to one of its most prominent professors - during a reunion of her brightest students, one of the group is found murdered at the bottom of a flight of stairs. Lewis is convinced that the killing is connected to a brutal attack which occurred at the college ten years before - as the investigation progresses, he and Hathaway are drawn ever deeper into the mystery of the college and its secrets.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and Carter go after Billy Medhurst, a man who was implicated in a robbery in which a policeman was shot... but is the past clouding Regan's judgement?

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.

programme.title: Formula E Live
programme.desc: Live coverage of the Round Eight E-Prix from Berlin. German driver Pascal Wehrlein will hope to delight the locals with another win to maintain his push for the title. [S]

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Ray Veilleux spins out into oncoming big rigs, Jack Jessee battles a 200-ton monster haul to Prudhoe, Alex Debogorski risks a bust by the DOT, and Lisa Kelly races to raise cash to buy back her horse.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Action-adventure series based on best-selling novels by Bernard Cornwell. With its last battle having been fought, the Peninsula War is finally over for Britain and her allies, but the action does not end here for Sharpe as he is framed by his long-time enemy Ducos and accused of stealing Napoleon's treasures. Sharpe also finds himself abandoned by his wife Jane, who returns to England and meets the handsome Lord Rossendale - now on the run from both the English and the French, Sharpe must find a way to prove his innocence.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Millhayes Lakes in Devon. The mission is to catch a 30lb UK carp, with the bite filmed on an underwater camera. Small lakes in springtime can be notoriously tricky, so with the addition of a diver and underwater cameras, this will be no easy task. After catching some smaller specimens, they crack the tactics and bait code, but will they bank that illusive 30lber before the end of the trip?

The face-off between former friends is more than just a fight - to settle the score, Adonis must put his future on the line to battle Damian, a fighter who has nothing to lose and everything to win.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. New recruit Bob Hargreaves joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but is the newcomer up to it? Jack Regan thinks not, but nobody seems to share his view...

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. A new tournament kicks off in the fight capital of the world for robotic combat's hottest trophy - the Golden Bolt - but the robots must first face the toughest battle ever seen in Las Vegas: the Sin City Slugfest.

programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas comes out of his coma but discovers that his troubles are far from over as Colonel Ki's vengeful brother Quang is still determined to kill him once and for all.

programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. When a boat belonging to one of Theo's fellow detectives is destroyed in an arson attack, Kojak sets out to prove that his wife's sleazy divorce lawyer is responsible.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Action-adventure series based on best-selling novels by Bernard Cornwell. programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: Classic fantasy drama. Iowa farmer Ray Kinsella hears a voice in a cornfield tell him, 'If you build it, he will come' - he interprets this message as an instruction to build a baseball field on his farm that the ghosts of Shoeless Joe Jackson and seven other Chicago White Sox players banned from the game for throwing the 1919 World Series appear upon. When the voices continue, Ray seeks out a reclusive author to help him understand the meaning of the messages and the purpose for his field...

programme.title: Coogan's Bluff
programme.desc: Action comedy. Arizona Deputy Sheriff Coogan is sent to New York City to collect James Ringerman, a prisoner who has escaped from custody in Arizona - while Coogan is annoyed when everyone in New York City assumes that he is from Texas, his problems are made worse by news that the prisoner is in Bellevue after taking a trip on drugs while in custody. When Coogan decides to cut a few corners and the prisoner escapes in the process, Coogan is ordered home but refuses to do so without his man...
